creator: drs-freebsd@sieborger.nom.za
text:
Created attachment 232805
Patch

I've made the attached patch by git cherry-pick'ing these commits from the upstream Exim git:

https://git.exim.org/exim.git/commitdiff/fc624b8cb4c3312d7450dfa86adfa3fe8dd9cbeb 
https://git.exim.org/exim.git/commitdiff/2ead369f8435918f3f15408b9394e580bcaf0910

It needs to be applied with -p2.

I've built Exim with this patch and it has fixed the problem for me.
